0.text: Stable pulmonary nodules measuring 6 mm and 3 mm in diameter in the posterior segment of the right upper lobe, subpleural in location

1.text: 4.5 mm subpleural nodule in the anterior segment of the right upper lobe

2.text: 5.5 mm nodule in the minor fissure of the right lung, superior segment of the lower lobe

3.text: Stable nodular pulmonary nodules measuring 3 mm in diameter in the lingulosuperior segment of the left upper lobe

4.text: Stable nodular pulmonary nodules measuring 3 mm in diameter in the laterobasal segment of the left lower lobe
